visualizerParams.title: Digit Factorials
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Fix the logic to find all numbers equal to the sum of their digits' factorials.

solution.code:
from math import factorial

def solution():
    # Pre-calculate factorials of digits 0-9
    f = [factorial(i) for i in range(10)]
    total = 0
    # 9! * 7 is a safe upper bound
    for i in range(10, 2540161):
        s = 0
        temp = i
        while temp > 0:
            s += f[temp % 10]
            temp //= 10
        if s == i:
            total += i
    return total


if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(solution())
